overall.description: A cinematic third-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera moves from under a massive highway overpass, through a crowded corporate plaza with a distinctive diamond-shaped logo, and down a neon-lit avenue filled with pedestrians carrying umbrellas and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under massive highway overpass

events.description: large silver futuristic six-wheeled truck drives past on the wet road to the right
pedestrian with glowing red backpack and red umbrella walks toward camera from the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to busy traffic, observing futuristic vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: woman with red umbrella and neon pink glowing backpack walking toward the camera
futuristic silver truck with multiple wheels and illuminated headlights driving along the wet road

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure covering the walkway with embedded lighting
tall concrete wall with glowing digital advertising screens displaying video content
multi-lane road with wet reflective surface showing vehicle light reflections from the rain
tall curved street lamp with green metallic pole and horizontal light fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete overpass on a rainy evening, the camera moves along a covered sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road. Digital advertisements glow on the left wall while futuristic vehicles, including a large silver truck, pass by on the wet asphalt. A pedestrian with a distinctive neon pink backpack and red umbrella approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza entrance with distinctive diamond logo monument

events.description: exits the covered overpass into a large plaza with a prominent illuminated diamond-shaped logo structure
crowd density increases significantly with multiple pedestrians carrying colorful umbrellas crossing the plaza

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded plaza toward the street exit, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: woman with large blue umbrella and white outfit walking past the camera
person with red umbrella crossing the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: large illuminated diamond-shaped corporate logo mounted on a tall black pedestal structure
modern glass entrance to a corporate building with reflective surfaces
wide tiled pedestrian plaza area with yellow directional markings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens into a spacious corporate plaza dominated by a large illuminated diamond-shaped logo monument. The area is crowded with pedestrians carrying colorful umbrellas, including a woman in white with a blue umbrella who passes close to the camera. The glass facade of a corporate building rises on the left while the camera navigates through the scattered crowd toward the street exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown avenue with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards

events.description: exits the covered plaza back into the open street with heavy rain falling
camera follows a pedestrian with a distinctive glowing purple umbrella down the avenue
approaching a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles waiting at the traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking down the rain-soaked sidewalk following the person with the purple umbrella through the neon-lit city canyon

notable_agents.action: person in brown suit carrying a glowing purple umbrella walking steadily ahead of the camera
futuristic black sedan with glowing red taillights driving along the wet street

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows and orange neon horizontal accent lighting
large digital advertising screen displaying animated content on the side of a building
marked pedestrian crossing at the intersection ahead with traffic lights

segments.scene_description: Back in the open rain, the camera follows a pedestrian with a distinctive glowing purple umbrella down a canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers. The wet sidewalk reflects the city lights while futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene as the camera approaches a busy intersection with waiting traffic and crossing pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of a concrete overpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a cyberpunk city. It begins along a covered sidewalk under a massive overpass, where digital advertisements glow against the rain and futuristic vehicles, including a large silver truck, rush past on wet asphalt. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a spacious corporate plaza dominated by a towering, illuminated diamond-shaped logo and a crowd of pedestrians with colorful umbrellas. The movement then shifts back into the open rain, following a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella down a canyon of skyscrapers. Finally, the camera glides past reflective sidewalks and towering digital billboards toward a busy, light-filled intersection teeming with traffic and pedestrians.
